title: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
summary_full: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
summary_public: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
